title: Epirus, Athens & Crete
subtitle: A September road trip through mainland Greece, followed by Athens and Crete.
transport: Road trip in Epirus; remaining transport to be confirmed
summary: This year's main vacation begins with one week exploring Epirus by road with a friendly couple. After the road trip, the journey continues to Athens, then Crete, with the return flight to Denmark departing from Crete.

chapters.title: Epirus Road Trip
chapters.description: A shared road trip through the mountain landscapes, villages and towns of Epirus with another couple.

chapters.title: Athens
chapters.description: A city stay in Athens after the Epirus road trip.

chapters.title: Crete
chapters.description: The final part of the vacation in Crete before flying back to Denmark.

knownPlan: Approximately one week road-tripping in Epirus
planningNeeded: Epirus road-trip route and overnight towns
